dependencies.description:
This module provides various memoizing collections and decorators,
including variants of the Python 3 Standard Library @lru_cache function
decorator.
dependencies.name: py-cachetools

dependencies.description: Flit is a simple way to put Python packages and modules on PyPI.
dependencies.name: py-flit

dependencies.description: GitPython is a python library used to interact with Git repositories.
dependencies.name: py-gitpython

dependencies.description:
Jinja2 is a template engine written in pure Python. It provides a Django
inspired non-XML syntax but supports inline expressions and an optional
sandboxed environment.
dependencies.name: py-jinja2

dependencies.description: Workflow mgmgt + task scheduling + dependency resolution
dependencies.name: py-luigi

dependencies.description: parse() is the opposite of format()
dependencies.name: py-parse

dependencies.description: The PyPA recommended tool for installing Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-pip

dependencies.description:
WebDAV client, based on original package
https://github.com/designerror/webdav-client-python but uses requests
instead of PyCURL.
dependencies.name: py-webdavclient3

dependencies.description: A Spack managed Python virtual environment
dependencies.name: python-venv

description:
b2luigi is a helper package constructed around luigi that helps you
schedule working packages (so-called tasks) locally or on a batch
system. Apart from the very powerful dependency management system by
luigi, b2luigi extends the user interface and has a built-in support for
the queue systems, e.g. LSF and HTCondor.
name: py-b2luigi

variants.description: Build systems supported by the package
variants.name: build_system
